OPERATIONAL FRICTION

## When your systems lag, your customer experience does too.

![](https://iterable.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/icon-latency.svg)

### The latency gap

Slow builds mean messages arrive after the window of peak intent has passed.

![](https://iterable.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/icon-bottleneck.svg)

### The engineering bottleneck

Dependence on custom coding and manual tickets stalls your team’s ability to act quickly.

![](https://iterable.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/icon-relevance.svg)

### The relevance trade-off

When speed is the priority, personalization suffers, leading to generic messages that are ignored.

![](https://iterable.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/campaigns-dynamic-templates.webp)

dynamic templates

## Build in minutes, not hours.

With a centralized workspace and reusable content blocks, your team can send orchestrated, cross-channel campaigns at the speed of the market.

Handlebars agent

## 1:1 precision, zero engineering tickets.

Achieve enterprise-grade personalization without SQL or code. Use unified data profiles and Nova Intelligence to find high-value segments and deliver messages tailored to every individual.

![](https://iterable.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/campaigns-handlebars-agents.webp)

![](https://iterable.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/campaigns-enterprise-alerts.webp)

enterprise alerts

## Send with absolute certainty.

With real-time delivery monitoring and built-in health indicators and controls,  
marketing teams get live visibility into delivery health, ensuring every message  
lands exactly when it should.

## Campaigns that keep up with your customers.

![](https://iterable.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/campaigns-contentstaysfresh.webp)

### Content that stays fresh

Scale your recurring newsletters with dynamic content blocks that pull in real-time data, ensuring every reader gets relevant information without extra manual effort.

![](https://iterable.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/campaigns-ownthemoment.webp)

### Own the moment

Respond to market shifts in seconds. Draft, preview, and send one-off alerts across push, SMS, email, and WhatsApp the minute news breaks.

![](https://iterable.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/campaigns-promotions-that-perform.webp)

### Promotions that perform

Launch sales with confidence. Use Nova Decisioning to reach customers when they are most likely to convert, while protecting list health with frequency caps.

## Built for campaigns that move at the speed of your business.

Eliminate the trade-offs between speed and performance with an architecture that scales with your ambition.

### Speed without friction

Go from idea to send in a fraction of the time by eliminating operational delays and dependencies that slow down legacy teams.

### Precision at global scale

Deliver 1:1 tailored messages to millions of customers simultaneously, powered by a unified data foundation that handles complexity without lagging.

### Reliability you can trust

Send with the peace of mind of enterprise-grade delivery controls and live monitoring that ensures you reach the inbox every time.

### Autonomy for the marketer

Move fast without sacrificing quality. Combine rapid execution with deep technical power, no trade-offs required.
